'''Allia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Customs official/Legends|customs officer]] at the [[Wroona/Legends|Wroona]] starport. He was susceptible to flirtatious women and being bought alcohol. In this manner, he let much contraband onto the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] dealt with him on a number of occasions.<ref name="PSG" />
